texto: '24' is a pretty serious show - there isn't a lot of improv that is happening. Having said that, I do play around with the delivery. A lot of the humor comes from playing a character who is very furious and really up in her own brain and in a serious situation. That is humorous to me.
explicacao: Citação de Mary Lynn Rajskub sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “'24' is a pretty serious show - there isn't a lot of improv that is happening. Having said that, …” articula inteligencia, character, brain em registro de inteligencia, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e brain.

frase_original: '24' is a pretty serious show - there isn't a lot of improv that is happening. Having said that, I do play around with the delivery. A lot of the humor comes from playing a character who is very furious and really up in her own brain and in a serious situation. That is humorous to me.
